subtopics.label: Small Craft Advisories for Lake Erie
subtopics.summary: This cluster is dedicated to automated weather alerts, specifically "Small Craft Advisory" notices for the nearshore waters of Lake Erie [3l4xnp5gajw2f, 3llvzutkfmr2c, 3levpnk3ibd2l]. These advisories consistently detail expected wind speeds, typically ranging from 15 to 25 knots, sometimes with gusts up to 35 knots, and corresponding wave heights which can reach 6 to 9 feet [3levpnk3ibd2l]. The alerts pinpoint the affected region as Lake Erie from Conneaut OH to Ripley NY [3l4xnp5gajw2f, 3llvzutkfmr2c, 3levpnk3ibd2l].

key_quotes.quote: NEW WEATHER ADVISORY: Small Craft Advisory
key_quotes.note: This quote is central as all documents are new weather advisories specifically for small craft.

key_quotes.quote: West winds 15 to 25 knots with gusts up to 35 knots and waves 6 to 9 feet.
key_quotes.note: This illustrates the specific, detailed meteorological conditions that trigger these advisories, including wind speed and wave height.

key_quotes.quote: The nearshore waters of Lake Erie from Conneaut OH to Ripley NY.
key_quotes.note: This quote highlights the consistent geographical focus of the advisories across all provided documents.

subtopics.label: Expired Lake Michigan Marine Warnings
subtopics.summary: This cluster discusses the expiration of marine warnings issued by GRR for specific sections of Lake Michigan [3mjljuud3os2s, 3mjiumwro242v, 3ltqiip2j3u2b]. The affected areas include the waters from Grand Haven to Whitehall MI and from Holland to Grand Haven MI, both nearshore (5NM offshore) and extending to mid-lake [3mjljuud3os2s]. These posts serve as informational updates regarding the status of these weather-related advisories [3ltqiip2j3u2b].

key_quotes.quote: GRR expires Marine Warning for Grand Haven to Whitehall MI
key_quotes.note: This quote directly states the primary action and key geographical area of the cluster.

key_quotes.quote: Holland to Grand Haven MI, Lake Michigan from Grand Haven to Whitehall MI 5NM offshore to Mid Lake
key_quotes.note: This highlights the specific coastal cities and the extent of the lake area covered by the warnings.

key_quotes.quote: Lake Michigan from Holland to Grand Haven MI 5NM offshore to Mid Lake
key_quotes.note: This further emphasizes the precise location and offshore distance relevant to the marine warnings.

subtopics.label: Lake Michigan Marine Weather Alerts
subtopics.summary: This cluster reports on official updates regarding marine warnings issued for specific sections of Lake Michigan. Posts indicate that the GRR agency is either cancelling or expiring marine warnings for areas such as South Haven to Holland MI and St Joseph to South Haven MI [3lw6mnytix42i, 3lkrhqdlvr62h, 3moguaufnn62t].

key_quotes.quote: GRR cancels Marine Warning for Lake Michigan
key_quotes.note: This quote directly states the action being taken by the GRR agency regarding marine safety.

key_quotes.quote: GRR expires Marine Warning for Lake Michigan
key_quotes.note: This shows another type of status change for marine warnings, indicating their conclusion.

key_quotes.quote: St Joseph to South Haven MI
key_quotes.note: This phrase highlights the specific geographic areas on Lake Michigan that are the subject of these warnings.
